affected_services.details: 2236 DNS resolution errors: 'dial tcp: lookup front-end on 127.0.0.11:53: read udp ... i/o timeout' (×2236) between 16:06:24 and 16:25:32 UTC. First error at 16:06:24 UTC, preceding front-end unavailability.

Node.js startup failure: 'npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script' (×54) and 'SyntaxError: Unexpected token u' (×54) at 16:06:24 UTC. Service flapped (up=0/1) between 15:58:09 and 16:01:39 UTC. Memory spike: max=507596800 bytes at 16:20:54 UTC. CPU spike: max=0.0264 cores/s at 16:15:24 UTC (4.0×avg).
Trace latency: avg=10.6ms, max=359ms. CPU throttling spike: max=0.0651 at 15:59:54 UTC (12.4×avg).
Trace latency: avg=7.0ms, max=217ms. CPU spike: max=0.01321 cores/s at 15:46:39 UTC (3.2×avg). CPU throttling spike: max=0.06765 at 15:46:39 UTC (26.6×avg).
CPU spike: max=0.01836 cores/s at 15:43:24 UTC (5.7×avg). CPU throttling spike: max=0.0878 at 15:43:09 UTC (64.5×avg).

root_cause.summary: The front-end service failed to start due to a Node.js runtime error (misconfigured dependencies), while the edge-router experienced DNS resolution failures (misconfigured Docker DNS resolver), causing cascading unavailability.

causal_chain.event: DNS resolution failures began: 'dial tcp: lookup front-end on 127.0.0.11:53: read udp ... i/o timeout' (×34). Docker DNS resolver (127.0.0.11:53) was misconfigured or unreachable.
causal_chain.evidence: [ERROR ×34] time="2026-05-07T16:06:24Z" level=warning msg="Error forwarding to http://front-end:8079, err: dial tcp: lookup front-end on 127.0.0.11:53: read udp 127.0.0.1:44479->127.0.0.11:53: i/o timeout"

causal_chain.event: Node.js application failed to start due to runtime errors: 'npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script' (×54) and 'SyntaxError: Unexpected token u' (×54). Likely cause: corrupted dependencies or misconfigured Node.js environment.
causal_chain.evidence: [ERROR ×54] time="2026-05-07T16:06:24Z" level=error msg="npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script 'node server.js'."

causal_chain.event: Service became unavailable (metrics port unreachable): 'up=0' in 25% of samples. First drop to 0 at 15:58:09 UTC, flapping until 16:01:39 UTC.
causal_chain.evidence: __name__=up, instance=front-end:8079, job=frontend: dropped to 0.0 at 15:58:09 UTC, recovered at 15:58:39 UTC, flapped until 16:01:39 UTC.

causal_chain.event: Memory usage spiked to 507.6MB, likely due to failed restart attempts or memory leaks from unresolved errors.
causal_chain.evidence: container_label_com_docker_compose_service=front-end: min=61591552.0, avg=228840218.74627, max=507596800.0 (peak at 16:20:54 UTC, 201 pts)

causal_chain.event: HTTP 5xx error rate spiked to 2.91942 errors/s as edge-router requests failed to reach the unavailable front-end service.
causal_chain.evidence: job=frontend, status_code=500: min=0.0, avg=0.79886, max=2.91942 (peak at 15:59:09 UTC, 122 pts) *** SPIKE (3.7×avg) ***

contributing_factors: Docker DNS resolver (127.0.0.11:53) misconfiguration amplified DNS resolution failures in the edge-router.
CPU throttling in carts, orders, and shipping services (likely due to resource limits) exacerbated latency spikes.
Missing Java metrics instrumentation prevented deeper error analysis of downstream services.

impact: End-user requests to the front-end service failed with HTTP 500 errors due to DNS resolution failures in the edge-router, caused by the front-end service's unavailability. Downstream services (carts, orders, shipping) experienced latency spikes and CPU throttling, further degrading user experience.
